(19:02) TENET X 2020

(1:26:57) SLIMIEST SCENES + RATINGS

(1:35:01) THE "FORGIVE ME LORD, FOR I HAVE SYNTHED" LOTTERY


SCOTT‚ÄôS PICK x SCOTT'S PICKS

A secret agent is thrust into a high-stakes shadow war where the primary weapon isn‚Äôt ballistics, but the manipulation of entropy itself. Armed with only the cryptic word "Tenet," he must navigate a labyrinth of international espionage to prevent a global catastrophe orchestrated from the future. As the laws of cause and effect unravel, he discovers that saving the world requires mastering a reality that flows backward as often as it moves forward. We live in a twilight world and This is Christopher Nolan's 2020 film TENET.

bonusLike:
Lord have mercy on our wretched souls, for we have a confession to make: we have succumbed to the secular temptations of the synthesizer.

You are hereby summoned to join us as we endure an electronic kaleidoscope of blinding visuals, mind-bending cinema, and sheer, unholy magic. May the Lord grant us strength.

What follows is the excerpt appended to the conclusion of Episode 4: Tenet.

Consider this a solemn warning of the films you are requested to watch alongside us.


A Tithing Notice: In the future, this revelation will be delivered earlier to our most faithful patrons on Patreon. We offer our bitter, stoic gratitude for your financial support. It is a small comfort in this valley of tears.


Prepare your spirit for the month of JUNE... and for the heavy penance of Renn‚Äôs chosen category:

"Forgive Me Lord, For I Have Synthed"

Go in peace to love and serve the beat.

awards:
The 1st Annual Slimey Awards


We made it! ONE FULL YEAR of Cinema Slime is in the books! To celebrate, we‚Äôre hosting our version of the Oscars.


Instead of a standard "Best Picture" list, we each brought 5 personalized awards to the table. That‚Äôs 15 total trophies being handed out across the 52 films we covered this year. Whether it's the "Genuinely The Best Movie We Watched" or the "Throw Your Life Away" award, no film from the last 52 weeks is safe.


The Award Itinerary:


(5:15) The Never Again... But Respect Award

(9:43) The Best Villain Performance Award

(14:13) The I Forgot We Watched That / Anti-Slime Award

(18:00) The Came Out of Left Field Award

(21:38) The Nobody Else Could Have Done It Award

(21:50) The I Feel Dumb When I Explain It Award

(29:00) The Better With Age Award

(34:38) The Throw Your Life Away Award (Male + Female)

(40:02) The On Second Thought Maybe We Shouldn't Have Picked This Award

(43:44) The Best Ending Award

(49:18) The Turn Your Brain Off / Laundry Friendly Award

(53:50) The Movie That Changed My Opinion of You Award

(59:21) The Best Visuals Award

(1:04:23) The Best Needle Drop / Soundtrack Award

(1:08:05) The Genuinely The Best Movie We Watched Award

(1:18:07) Random Bonus Awards

gattaca:
"My real resume was in my cells"


(8:50) MARVEL + COMICS + CHILDHOOD CARTOONS

(14:00) CINEMA SLIME FAMILY FEUD

(23:20) GATTACA x 1997

(1:33:40) SLIMIEST SCENES + RATINGS


SCOTT‚ÄôS PICK x SCOTT'S PICKS

In a future obsessed with genetic perfection, Vincent Freeman is an "In-Valid" deemed destined for mediocrity, yet he refuses to let his DNA dictate his fate. To pursue his lifelong dream of space travel, he assumes the identity of a genetically elite athlete, navigating a high-stakes world of deception to infiltrate the Gattaca Aerospace Corporation. As he inches closer to the stars, Vincent must constantly outsmart the society designed to keep him grounded, proving that the human spirit cannot be reduced to a strand of code. This is Andrew Niccol‚Äôs 1997 film Gattaca.
